ac_unit.name: Air Conditioner
ac_unit.recommendation: Set the thermostat 2 degrees higher to save up to 10% on energy and cooling emissions.

car.name: Gasoline Car
car.recommendation: Consider carpooling or taking public transit twice a week to drastically reduce your transport footprint.

zuk.name: Zuk Van
zuk.recommendation: Consider upgrading your classic van to an electric vehicle, or maintain the engine for better fuel efficiency.

burger.name: Beef Burger
burger.recommendation: Swap one beef meal a week for a plant-based alternative to cut dietary emissions.

avocado.name: Imported Avocado
avocado.recommendation: Try to buy locally sourced produce when in season to reduce air-freight and transport emissions.

duck.name: Plastic Rubber Duck
duck.recommendation: Support brands that make toys and products from recycled ocean plastics or biodegradable materials.

waterbottle.name: Single-Use Plastic Bottle
waterbottle.recommendation: Switching to a reusable metal or glass bottle prevents hundreds of single-use plastics from reaching landfills.

coffeecup.name: Plastic Coffee Cup
coffeecup.recommendation: Bring a reusable thermos or mug to your local cafe to eliminate daily plastic and paper waste.

laptop.name: Laptop Computer
laptop.recommendation: Extend the lifespan of your electronics and recycle e-waste properly to reduce manufacturing emissions.

cloudstorage.name: Digital Footprint
cloudstorage.recommendation: Clean out old cloud storage, stream videos in Standard Definition (SD) instead of 4K, and extend the lifespan of smartphones to 4+ years.

lightbulb.name: Incandescent Light Bulb
lightbulb.recommendation: Switch to LED bulbs. They use up to 90% less energy and last 25 times longer than traditional incandescent bulbs.

shirt.name: Cotton Shirt
shirt.recommendation: Avoid fast fashion. Buy high-quality clothes, mend what you have, and shop second-hand to reduce textile waste and emissions.
